executiveSummary: Google Scholar, Semantic Scholar, Crossref, CORE, OpenAlex, and Dimensions provide citation indexing and academic research tools. Consensus AI offers 220 million scientific papers. ProQuest One Academic includes AI research assistant features.

sources.description: 8 best AI research tools for professionals and academics in 2026, tested across literature search, citation analysis, systematic review and source grounding. Elicit, Consensus, Perplexity, Scite & more — honest reviews with pricing.

sources.description: Consensus AI is the search engine with 220 million peer-reviewed papers, Scholar Agent on GPT-5, and Deep Search. Complete 2026 guide with pricing, features, and comparisons.
